quantified_impact.qualitative_phrasing: Foundational estate-plan vehicle: avoids probate, provides incapacity protection, and serves as architecture to which irrevocable trusts (ILIT, GRAT, IDGT) attach. Probate-cost avoidance typically 1-3% of probate estate plus 6-18 months of delay.

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts joint revocable living trust document for Marcus and Catherine.
Fund the trust by retitling investment accounts, real estate, and (post-recap) business voting interest into trust name.
sub_steps: Retitle Schwab taxable brokerage ($1.8M) to trust
Execute and record deeds for East Cobb residence and Blue Ridge vacation home
Coordinate post-recap titling of holdco voting interest into trust

sub_steps: Healthcare directive / medical POA for each spouse

Estate-tax savings on principal alone ~$1.22M; including growth, often $2.5M+.
